# Part 2: Mức lương ở các vị trí việc làm trong lĩnh vực khoa học dữ liệu

```{r p2-setup, include=FALSE}
if (!requireNamespace("here", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("here")
source(here::here("config", "setup.R"))
knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.align = "center")
```

```{r child=here::here("Part_2_SalaryDS","Part_1_SalaryDS_AB.Rmd")}
```

```{r child=here::here("Part_2_SalaryDS","Part_2_SalaryDS_C.Rmd")}
```

```{r child=here::here("Part_2_SalaryDS","Part_3_SalaryDS_DE.Rmd")}
```

```{r child=here::here("Part_2_SalaryDS","Part_4_SalaryDS_FG.Rmd")}
```

```{r child=here::here("Part_2_SalaryDS","Part_5_SalaryDS_H.Rmd")}
```
